title: Bobicraft's Chimuelo
description: Fly with Toothless with this datapack or mod and enjoy having your favorite dragon accompanying you everywhere.
body:
# Bobicraft's Chimuelo

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/tjETA5u2HLI" title="Bobicraft Video" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


_Filmed in a zephyhosting's server (https://www.zephyhosting.com/)_
<hr>

## 📖 Descripcion

- Si en una tormenta electrica cae un rayo sin ser atraido por un pararrayos, Chimuelo tendra un 20% de posibilidades de spawnear si no hay otro sin domesticar en el mundo.
- Domesticalo con una montura y cola (receta añadida y enseñada en galeria), acercandote poco a poco con el item en la mano.
- Podras sentarlo y levantarlo con shift+click
- Te subiras a el con click y podras manejarlo en tierra con WASD
- Corre manteniendo CTRL, asi podras saltar con espacio
- Cuando este corriendo, salta dandole un toque muy breve a la barra espaciadora y emprenderas vuelo
- Mientras Podras controlar el vuelo "estatico" con WASD
- Si empiezas a sprintar con CTRL a la vez que avanzas, Chimuelo volara mas veloz y siguiendo tu mirada
- En vuelo podras darle al espacio para cargar su ataque, el cual disparas con click izquierdo

## 📖 Description

- If in a thunderstorm lightning strikes without being attracted by a lightning rod, Toothless will have a 20% chance of spawning if there is no other undomesticated in the world.
- Tame it with a mount and tail (recipe added and taught in gallery), approaching it little by little with the item in your hand.
- You will be able to sit him down and lift him up with shift+click.
- You will get on it with click and you will be able to handle it on the ground with WASD.
- Run by holding CTRL, so you can jump with space.
- When you are running, jump by tapping the space bar and you will take flight.
- While you can control the flight “static” with WASD
- If you start sprinting with CTRL while moving forward, Toothless will fly faster and follow your gaze.
- In flight you can hit space to charge his attack, which you shoot with left click.


## ⌨️ Commands/Comandos

Spawn Dragon:
```mcfunction
/function vbc719:g/0spawnear
```

Delete Dragon (you need to be riding the dragon):

```mcfunction
/execute on vehicle on vehicle run function vbc719:o/eli
```
<hr>
